message:
Add See Also sections to operators with integrations

Convert 5 operator reference pages from .md to .mdx and add
cross-references to their corresponding integration pages:
- from_gcs → google/cloud-storage
- to_snowflake → snowflake
- to_azure_log_analytics → microsoft/azure-log-analytics
- from_velociraptor → velociraptor
- to_sentinelone_data_lake → sentinelone-data-lake

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4,6 +4,9 @@ category: Inputs/Events
 example: 'from_gcs "gs://my-bucket/data/**.json"'
 ---
 
+import Op from '@components/see-also/Op.astro';
+import Integration from '@components/see-also/Integration.astro';
+
 Reads one or multiple files from Google Cloud Storage.
 
 ```tql
@@ -125,3 +128,9 @@ from_gcs "gs://security-logs/suricata/**.json" {
   read_suricata
 }
 ```
+
+## See Also
+
+- <Op>load_gcs</Op>
+- <Op>save_gcs</Op>
+- <Integration>google/cloud-storage</Integration>

@@ -4,6 +4,8 @@ category: Inputs/Events
 example: 'from_velociraptor subscribe="Windows"'
 ---
 
+import Integration from '@components/see-also/Integration.astro';
+
 Submits VQL to a Velociraptor server and returns the response as events.
 
 ```tql
@@ -139,3 +141,7 @@ from_velociraptor query="select * from pslist()"
 ```tql
 from_velociraptor subscribe="Windows"
 ```
+
+## See Also
+
+- <Integration>velociraptor</Integration>

@@ -4,6 +4,8 @@ category: Outputs/Events
 example: 'to_azure_log_analytics tenant_id="...", workspace_id="..."'
 ---
 
+import Integration from '@components/see-also/Integration.astro';
+
 Sends events to the Microsoft Azure Logs Ingestion API.
 
 ```tql
@@ -71,3 +73,7 @@ to_azure_log_analytics tenant_id="00a00a00-0a00-0a00-00aa-000aa0a0a000",
   dcr="dcr-xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx",
   stream="Custom-MyData"
 ```
+
+## See Also
+
+- <Integration>microsoft/azure-log-analytics</Integration>

@@ -4,6 +4,9 @@ category: Outputs/Events
 example: 'to_sentinelone_data_lake "https://…", …'
 ---
 
+import Op from '@components/see-also/Op.astro';
+import Integration from '@components/see-also/Integration.astro';
+
 Sends security events to SentinelOne Singularity Data Lake via REST API.
 
 ```tql
@@ -114,3 +117,8 @@ If you already have structured data in Tenzir, prefer sending structured data, a
 you will only be charged for the values and one byte per key, as opposed to the
 full keys and structural characters in `message`.
 :::
+
+## See Also
+
+- <Op>from_sentinelone_data_lake</Op>
+- <Integration>sentinelone-data-lake</Integration>

@@ -4,6 +4,8 @@ category: Outputs/Events
 example: 'to_snowflake account_identifier="…'
 ---
 
+import Integration from '@components/see-also/Integration.astro';
+
 Sends events to a Snowflake database.
 
 ```tql
@@ -93,3 +95,7 @@ to_snowflake \
   schema="SURICATA_ALERT",
   table="TENZIR"
 ```
+
+## See Also
+
+- <Integration>snowflake</Integration>
